### Post by cdonke on 2009-09-24
Hey there..

I'm kinda new to Linux, anda i'm having a lot work with IPTables..

I have to redirect the incoming requests from public ip:1235 tp 192.168.1.114:1235.

With this configuration it works locally... From my debug app, i fire the event to the public IP and get the response... but from my remote hosting, i'm getting "No connection could be made because the target machine actively refuse it public ip:1235"

What should be wrong???

-A POSTROUTING -s 192.168.1.114 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 1235 --dport 1235 -j MASQUERADE
